raw_transcript: This is embarrassing, but they're... they're oily. Often they float, and they're incredibly foul-smelling. I have to flush the toilet twice just to get rid of the residue. It's really gross.
final_corrected_note: This is embarrassing, but they're... they're oily. Often they float, and they're incredibly foul-smelling. I have to flush the toilet twice just to get rid of the residue. It's really gross.
